question.en: A network technician is connecting to a switch to modify the configuration. DHCP is not enabled on the management port. Which of the following does the technician need to configure to connect to the device?

question.en: An architect designs the building blueprint  for a new office. The IT team has to purchase equipment and cabling. Upon inspection of the building layout, it is discovered that no designation was made for network infrastructure wiring, cabling, and services  for the building. Which of the following needs to be documented in the blueprint for building connectivity?

question.en: A network technician has been notified that an available wireless SSID is using insecure WEP encryption and has been asked to investigate what other options are available on the existing wireless hardware. The technician has found that the WAPs support AES-CCMP. Which of the following should the technician configure?

question.en: A technician is called to troubleshoot a client PC that is not connecting to the network. The technician first examines the LEDs on the NIC and connection to the wall jack. question.en: Users within an office building report wireless connectivity is sporadic.  A wireless technician troubleshooting the issue notices there are multiple WAPs visible in the same hallway within 20ft (6m) of one another. Which of the following is causing the issue?

question.en: A network technician is tasked with troubleshooting intermittent network connectivity issues within an organization.  Which of the following are possible network service issues? (Select TWO).

question.en: In troubleshooting network performance issues on a computer, a technician finds that the CAT5e cable was run through a conduit with power lines. There is plenty of spare room in the conduit, and a cable continuity test is successful. Which of the following is the MOST likely issue?
question.zh: In troubleshooting network performance issues on a computer, a technician finds that the CAT5e cable was run through a conduit with power lines. There is plenty of spare room in the conduit, and a cable continuity test is successful. Which of the following is the MOST likely issue?

question.en: One purpose of network segmentation is to:
question.zh: One purpose of network segmentation is to:
question.ms: One purpose of network segmentation is to:
question.zh-Hans: One purpose of network segmentation is to:
question.zh-Hant: One purpose of network segmentation is to:

text.en: A. protect sensitive data from the rest of the network.
text.zh: A. protect sensitive data from the rest of the network.
text.ms: A. protect sensitive data from the rest of the network.
text.zh-Hans: A. protect sensitive data from the rest of the network.
text.zh-Hant: A. protect sensitive data from the rest of the network.

text.en: B. make file transfers easier for end-users.
text.zh: B. make file transfers easier for end-users.
text.ms: B. make file transfers easier for end-users.
text.zh-Hans: B. make file transfers easier for end-users.
text.zh-Hant: B. make file transfers easier for end-users.

text.en: C. allow certain services to talk to each other without a choke point
text.zh: C. allow certain services to talk to each other without a choke point
text.ms: C. allow certain services to talk to each other without a choke point
text.zh-Hans: C. allow certain services to talk to each other without a choke point
text.zh-Hant: C. allow certain services to talk to each other without a choke point

text.en: D. hold all hardened baseline images for deployment.
text.zh: D. hold all hardened baseline images for deployment.
text.ms: D. hold all hardened baseline images for deployment.
text.zh-Hans: D. hold all hardened baseline images for deployment.
text.zh-Hant: D. hold all hardened baseline images for deployment.
